pair.value: LM Review and Process Cancellation Request

Manager reviews and approves or rejects the leave cancellation request. If approved, the system cancels the leave request, restores leave days to employee balance, removes leave from calendar, and sends cancellation confirmation. If rejected, the system maintains original approved leave status and sends cancellation rejection notification.
LM Review and Process Cancellation Request
Process begins when an employee requests cancellation of their approved leave
Manager reviews the leave cancellation request details, employee's original leave information, and decides whether to approve or reject the cancellation
Decision point to determine if user cancelled out of the form before submitting
Automatically sets review timestamps and decision status for processing before writing to the database
Saves the manager's cancellation decision to the leave request record in the database
Decision point to determine if the manager approved or rejected the cancellation request
Updates leave request status to cancelled, restores leave days to employee balance, and removes leave from calendar
Notifies employee that their cancellation request was approved and their leave balance has been restored
Keeps the original approved leave status unchanged and prepares rejection notification
Updates the leave request record to reflect that cancellation was rejected and original approval remains
Notifies employee that their cancellation request was rejected and their original approved leave remains in effect
Process completes with cancellation either approved and balance restored, or rejected with original leave maintained

annotation.text: To-Do: Create an interface that displays the original leave request details, cancellation reason, and provides approve/reject buttons for the manager's decision
To-Do: Implement logic to set decision timestamp, reviewer information, and prepare data for database update
To-Do: Apply evaluation logic to check the manager's decision from the review form
To-Do: Implement logic to restore leave balance, update calendar, and set cancellation status
To-Do: Implement logic to maintain approved status and prepare rejection notification content
